ddls:
CREATE TABLE "materials" (
  "material_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each material */,
  "material_name" TEXT /* Name of the material */,
  "unit_cost" REAL /* Cost of the material per unit */,
  "material_type" TEXT /* Type of the material (e.g., raw, processed) */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., kg, lbs, units) */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Threshold for automatic reordering */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the primary supplier for the material */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("material_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product (e.g., food, electronics) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "production_time" INTEGER /* Average time to produce one unit of the product */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the product details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "material_requirements" (
  "requirement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each material requirement */,
  "material_id" INTEGER /* ID of the material required */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product that requires the material */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the material required */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the requirement became effective */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the requirement details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("requirement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_material_requirements_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_material_requirements_material_id FOREIGN KEY ("material_id") REFERENCES materials ("material_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "material_costs" (
  "cost_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each material cost */,
  "material_id" INTEGER /* ID of the material */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the cost is applicable */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the material per product per year */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the cost became effective */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the cost details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cost_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_material_costs_material_id FOREIGN KEY ("material_id") REFERENCES materials ("material_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_material_costs_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product ordered */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer placing the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., placed, shipped, delivered) */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the order */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Address to which the order will be shipped */,
  "expected_delivery_date" TEXT /* Expected date for delivery */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "material_id" INTEGER /* ID of the material */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Current quantity of the material in stock */,
  "reorder_date" TEXT /* Date when the material was last reordered */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the inventory details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_material_id FOREIGN KEY ("material_id") REFERENCES materials ("material_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "material_id" INTEGER /* ID of the material supplied */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information of the supplier */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the supplier */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the supplier */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the supplier details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_suppliers_material_id FOREIGN KEY ("material_id") REFERENCES materials ("material_id")
)
